title: TONIFUL 40 Inch Large Gold Letter U Balloons - Helium Filled, Foil Mylar Big Balloons for Birthday Party & Anniversary Decorations
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES-- Letter U Balloon*1,40 inch Gold Letter balloon,you can choose the Letter you want.
MATERIAL-- Material of Letter Jumbo Helium Balloons is foil, color uniform, spherical beautiful,safe and non-toxic.
AMAZING PHOTO PROP -- It is a huge size and beautiful and unique Gold color visual effects.
CONWENIENCE-- Easy to inflate using the a straw or an air handheld pump,Can be air filled or helium filled.
WIDE RANGE OF USAGE-- This Gold Letter Foil Balloon is a Great Party Decoration for Graduation,Birthday,Wedding,Bridal Shower,Bachelorette,New Year Eve or Other Party Occasions.
description: From the brand Previous page TONIFUL is a brand that specializes in party decoration products, we want to help everyone have a surprise and unforgettable party. Whether you are organizing a birthday party, wedding celebration, graduation party or any other occasions, we can provide you with the high quality products you need to ensure your satisfaction. A party is a time for people to get together and share happiness. So bring surprise and joy to the party!
